# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: website-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: $(project)-website-bucket
    storageClass: STANDARD
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: 404.html
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
    accessControl:
      default:
      - entity: ALL_USERS
        role: roles/storage.objectViewer
      - entity: ALL_AUTHENTICATED_USERS
        role: roles/storage.objectViewer
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - iam-policy
- name: iam-policy
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:cloudresourcemanager.projects.iamPolicy
  properties:
    resource: $(project)
    policy:
      bindings:
      - role: roles/storage.admin
        members:
        - serviceAccount:$(project)-compute@developer.gserviceaccount.com
      - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
        members:
        - allUsers
        - allAuthenticatedUsers
      - role: roles/storage.objectCreator
        members:
        - serviceAccount:$(project)-compute@developer.gserviceaccount.com
      - role: roles/storage.objectAdmin
        members:
        - serviceAccount:$(project)-compute@developer.gserviceaccount.com
